summary_text:
# FusionTrack Anomaly Detection Experiment Summary

Date: 2026-05-21

Protocol:
- Individual strict alignment: 829 labels, every included method has 829 scores.
- Group strict alignment: 15605 labels, every included method has 15605 scores.
- Strict audit fields are all zero for included methods: duplicate labels, duplicate scores, missing scores, and extra scores.
- GPU official runs used NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090.

## Method Labels

The tables below use these labels:

- Our method: FusionTrack methods implemented as the proposed method family.
- Official paper baseline: other papers' methods run through official or official-source code where available.
- Classic baseline: established classical algorithms, locally adapted to this protocol.
- Internal proxy/ablation: local proxy or diagnostic implementation. These are useful for analysis, but should not be claimed as official paper baselines.
- Learning-based: the method fits parameters on the train split. This includes deep models, classical ML, nearest-neighbor profiles, PCA, and statistical normal profiles.
- Non-learning: deterministic rule, residual, or graph-scoring method without train-split fitting.

## Individual Results

| Method | Ownership | Learning type | Role | AUROC | AUPRC | F1 | P@100 | R@100 |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| individual_lof | Classic baseline | Learning, classical ML | Main baseline | 0.606512 | 0.159437 | 0.246014 | 0.160000 | 0.192771 |
| fusiontrack_individual_nn | Our method | Learning, nearest-neighbor profile | Proposed method | 0.595626 | 0.134131 | 0.237681 | 0.180000 | 0.216867 |
| individual_iforest | Classic baseline | Learning, classical ML | Main baseline | 0.592445 | 0.127709 | 0.218310 | 0.160000 | 0.192771 |
| individual_physics_kinematic_proxy | Internal proxy/ablation | Learning, statistical profile | Diagnostic/proxy only | 0.578410 | 0.126905 | 0.213740 | 0.170000 | 0.204819 |
| individual_complementary_cetrajad_proxy | Internal proxy/ablation | Learning, local CETrajAD-style proxy | Diagnostic/proxy only | 0.567137 | 0.122853 | 0.224793 | 0.130000 | 0.156627 |
| fusiontrack_individual_context | Our method | Learning, context-aware nearest-neighbor profile | Proposed method | 0.561275 | 0.120676 | 0.204348 | 0.130000 | 0.156627 |
| official_dcdetector | Official paper baseline | Learning, deep model | Main paper baseline | 0.517620 | 0.104025 | 0.182018 | 0.420000 | 0.506024 |
| official_anomaly_transformer | Official paper baseline | Learning, deep model | Main paper baseline | 0.493314 | 0.106029 | 0.183223 | 0.130000 | 0.156627 |
| individual_ocsvm | Classic baseline | Learning, classical ML | Main baseline | 0.484043 | 0.098442 | 0.185780 | 0.080000 | 0.096386 |
| official_pidpm | Official paper baseline | Learning, diffusion/deep model | Main paper baseline | 0.459236 | 0.092592 | 0.182618 | 0.110000 | 0.132530 |
| official_tranad | Official paper baseline | Learning, deep model | Main paper baseline | 0.443619 | 0.097967 | 0.186308 | 0.080000 | 0.096386 |
| official_lmtad | Official paper baseline | Learning, sequence model | Main paper baseline | 0.434462 | 0.086565 | 0.184721 | 0.070000 | 0.084337 |
| individual_trajectory_lm_ngram_proxy | Internal proxy/ablation | Learning, statistical language model | Diagnostic/proxy only | 0.419014 | 0.082957 | 0.185520 | 0.060000 | 0.072289 |

## Group Results

| Method | Ownership | Learning type | Role | AUROC | AUPRC | F1 | P@100 | R@100 |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| group_prediction_linear | Classic baseline | Non-learning, linear prediction residual | Main baseline | 0.622238 | 0.093898 | 0.162319 | 0.100000 | 0.113636 |
| official_anomaly_transformer | Official paper baseline | Learning, deep model | Main paper baseline | 0.601933 | 0.008517 | 0.021175 | 0.010000 | 0.011364 |
| official_dcdetector | Official paper baseline | Learning, deep model | Main paper baseline | 0.505261 | 0.005743 | 0.012371 | 0.060000 | 0.068182 |
| official_tranad | Official paper baseline | Learning, deep model | Main paper baseline | 0.423703 | 0.004994 | 0.017391 | 0.000000 | 0.000000 |
| group_lof | Classic baseline | Learning, classical ML | Main baseline | 0.417786 | 0.005899 | 0.031332 | 0.020000 | 0.022727 |
| group_temporal_graph_ae_proxy | Internal proxy/ablation | Learning, PCA reconstruction | Diagnostic/proxy only | 0.371188 | 0.005975 | 0.021277 | 0.010000 | 0.011364 |
| fusiontrack_group_graph | Our method | Non-learning, graph/rule scoring | Proposed method | 0.361618 | 0.006877 | 0.041152 | 0.030000 | 0.034091 |
| group_ocsvm | Classic baseline | Learning, classical ML | Main baseline | 0.261264 | 0.004887 | 0.030675 | 0.020000 | 0.022727 |
| group_iforest | Classic baseline | Learning, classical ML | Main baseline | 0.207463 | 0.003280 | 0.011258 | 0.000000 | 0.000000 |

## Coverage Notes

CETrajAD official is not included in the strict full-coverage individual table. Its official preprocessing filtered 59 validation trajectories under the stable adapter. When the adapter was relaxed to include zero-motion trajectories, the official PCA preprocessing failed with NaN input. Filling or jittering those trajectories would change the data, so the run is kept as coverage-failed rather than reported in the main table.

Summary files:
- final_individual_all_methods_summary.csv
- final_individual_all_methods_summary.json
- final_group_all_methods_summary.csv
- final_group_all_methods_summary.json
- final_individual_all_methods_categorized.csv
- final_group_all_methods_categorized.csv
